emails.subject: Re: Cutoff Time for EOL Gas Transactions
emails.subject_base: Cutoff Time for EOL Gas Transactions
emails.body: Re: Cutoff Time for EOL Gas Transactions Does this affect only the "booking" of the transactions? That is, from the contract point of view the trade is still done today, and should be dated the dy the trade was done, even though we may not get it into the bood until the following day. Sort of an internal vs. external issue. Enron North America Corp. From: Sheri Thomas 02/25/2000 04:46 PM
